items.description:

Chris Jones, Senior Lead, Ops AI Lab at Shopify, is helping teams use ChatGPT Work to redesign workflows with agents, remove bottlenecks, and build tools without waiting on engineering resources.

items.titleOriginal: How Shopify Uses ChatGPT Work to Build Faster with AI Agents

items.title: ChatGPT 现在可以在您的计算机上完成任务
items.description:
With GPT-5.6, ChatGPT can use the apps on your computer and your browser to complete tasks for you. See how it works across macOS and Windows, how you can collaborate with it in real time, and how it keeps multi-step work moving in the tools you already use.

Learn more: https://learn.chatgpt.com/
items.titleOriginal: ChatGPT can now complete tasks on your computer

items.title: 赛车揭示了如何与 AI 合作 — OpenAI 播客 Ep。 22
items.description: Racing is a sport of tiny margins and mountains of data. OpenAI researcher Joyce Ruffell and RaceTek Systems co-founder Chase Holden are each using AI to help teams make better use of information from the track, the garage, and the people behind the wheel. They discuss OpenAI’s research collaboratio
items.titleOriginal: What racing reveals about working with AI — the OpenAI Podcast Ep. 22

items.title: 以人工智能为先：Emmanuel Marill 谈如何打造人工智能本土公司 |法国 OpenAI
items.description: What are the most successful companies doing differently with AI? At OpenAI France, Emmanuel Marill, Managing Director, EMEA at OpenAI, shares why the biggest opportunities come from thinking AI-first rather than adding AI to existing ways of working. He also reflects on focus, solving real business
items.titleOriginal: Think AI-First: Emmanuel Marill on Building AI-Native Companies | OpenAI France

items.title: 停止提示。开始设定人工智能目标。 |卡蒂亚·吉尔·古兹曼 | 卡蒂亚·吉尔·古兹曼法国 OpenAI
items.description: The way we work with AI is changing. Katia Gil Guzman, Developer Experience at OpenAI, explains why we're moving from prompts to goals, how AI is enabling anyone to become a builder, and what excites her most about the rapidly evolving builder community in France. Filmed at OpenAI France.

items.title: 克劳德思考方式的不同层次
items.description:
Out of everything happening in your brain right now, only a tiny fraction is consciously accessible — thoughts you can describe, hold in mind, and reason with. We found a strikingly similar divide inside our AI model, Claude.

Our experiments were inspired by a leading theory in neuroscience: the gl
items.titleOriginal: The different levels of how Claude thinks

items.title: 克劳德寓言 5 简介
items.description:
Claude Fable 5 is our most capable model yet, now generally available. It’s a Mythos-class model with safeguards that let us share it broadly without compromising on safety.

It can stay with complex tasks and hard problems for days, handling ambitious work across coding, research, analysis, finance

items.title: 将克劳德的思想转化为语言
items.description:
AI models like Claude talk in words but think in numbers. These numbers, called activations, encode Claude’s thoughts, but not in a language we can read.

We are introducing Natural Language Autoencoders, or NLAs, which translate AI models’ activations into readable text. NLAs have already helped us

We formed Project Glasswi
items.titleOriginal: An initiative to secure the world's software | Project Glasswing

items.title: 当人工智能表现出情绪化时
items.description:
AI models sometimes act like they have emotions—why? 

We studied one of our recent models and found that it draws on emotion concepts learned from text to inhabit its role as Claude, the AI assistant. These representations influence its behavior the way emotions might influence a human. 

And that

items.title: 克劳德 Opus 4.6 简介
items.description:
Our smartest model got an upgrade. 

Claude Opus 4.6 plans more carefully, stays on task longer, and works more autonomously, so you can do more with less back-and-forth.

Read more: https://anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-6

items.title: 火星上的克劳德
items.description:
On December 8, the Perseverance rover safely trundled across the surface of Mars.

This was the first AI-planned drive on another planet. And it was planned by Claude.

Engineers at NASA Jet Propulsion Laboratory used Claude to plot out the route for Perseverance to navigate an approximately four-hu

items.title: 您的工具现在可以在 Claude 中进行交互
items.description: Your connected tools are now interactive inside Claude. Manage projects in Asana, draft messages in Slack, build charts in Amplitude, and create diagrams in Figma—without switching tabs.
items.titleOriginal: Your tools are now interactive in Claude
